dict.string: OpenChat needs camera access for video calls, photo upload and QR scanning.
OpenChat needs microphone access for voice calls, video calls and voice messages.
OpenChat needs photo library access to upload images and videos.
OpenChat needs photo library write access to save images and videos.
OpenChat needs contacts access to match contacts and start calls quickly.
OpenChat needs Bluetooth access to connect headsets and audio devices.
OpenChat needs Bluetooth access to connect call peripherals and accessories.
OpenChat needs local network access for LAN debugging and device discovery.
OpenChat uses Face ID for secure authentication and payment verification.
